expectedOutput.RootCause: Periodic access review was not performed.
expectedOutput.BusinessImpact: Unauthorized access to sensitive systems and data.
expectedOutput.RecommendedRemediation: Disable inactive accounts and remove unnecessary privileges.
expectedOutput.AuditNotes: Finding indicates 12 inactive users retain administrator privileges. Initiate remediation to disable the inactive accounts, remove administrator privileges where accounts must be retained, and validate completion through an access review. Retain evidence of the user list reviewed, account status changes, privilege removals, approval records, and system screenshots or audit logs demonstrating remediation for SOC 2 audit support.
